channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Antioch's Desalination Plant Set for Completion: A Game-Changer for the City's Water Supply
item.description: Antioch's nearly $100-million desalination plant is expected to start operating within the next few months, increasing the city's usable water supply and enabling it to continue using its pre-1914 water rights to pump water from the Sacramento-San Joaquin River Delta.
item.dc:creator: Hema Sivanandam, The Mercury News

item.title: AI ready to hit its stride in schools in 2025
item.description: Experts predict that 2025 will be the year artificial intelligence (AI) truly gets off the ground in K-12 schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence
item.description: Few departments have more diverse procurement needs than Homeland Security. The agency operates on natural disasters, immigration activity and cybersecurity. The post Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: The long-term impacts of AI on networking
item.description: AI is either going to spawn a golden age of profits and benefits or kill us all off, according to popular viewpoints on the subject. The latter view has been at least somewhat discredited; if you yell “AI” in a crowded theater these days, hardly anyone runs for the exits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Corporate One enables immediate payments with Data Orchestration Hub
item.description: Corporate One Federal Credit Union, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, is a non-profit that’s provided investment, funding, and payment solutions to their members for nearly 75 years.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk causes uproar by backing Germany’s far-right party AfD
item.description: The Tesla Motors CEO also wrote that his investment in Germany gave him the right to comment on the country’s condition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump weighs in on H-1B debate, backs immigration visas
item.description: “I’ve always liked the visas, I have always been in favor of the visas. That’s why we have them,” Trump said in a phone interview with The New York Post published Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is serverless? Serverless computing explained
item.description: Over the past two decades, considerable innovation has gone into making sure developers don’t have to think much about the underlying physical machine their code runs on. Serverless computing is a paradigm that takes this objective to its logical conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Info World
